mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lesson_plan (owner_id, child_id, class_id, source_iep_id, scene, mode, disorder_type, ai_draft, content, status) VALUES (#{ownerId}, #{childId}, #{classId}, #{sourceIepId}, #{scene}, #{mode}, #{disorderType}, #{aiDraft}, #{content}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, owner_id, child_id, class_id, source_iep_id, scene, mode, disorder_type, ai_draft, content, status FROM lesson_plan WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, owner_id, child_id, class_id, source_iep_id, scene, mode, disorder_type, ai_draft, content, status FROM lesson_plan WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE lesson_plan SET content = #{content}, ai_draft = #{aiDraft}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
